sanitization: No credentials, tokens, socket paths, hostnames, usernames, live pane ids, or live agent output are captured.
Request examples use deterministic placeholders and were derived from schema without being sent.

status_evidence.result_in_managed_runner: blocked before socket access: Operation not permitted
status_evidence.prior_live_read_only_evidence: docs/spikes/HERDR-0.7.5-COMPAT.md §7 records server 0.7.5, protocol 17, live_handoff=true on 2026-07-22

upstream_schema_inconsistency.description: Startup timeout in milliseconds. Values must be greater than 3000 and at most 300000.
upstream_schema_inconsistency.architect_resolution: Preserve both raw facts. PATCH 1 asserts optional request shape only, duplicates no numeric bound, and leaves validation to herdr.

key_token_policy: Schema/help accepts string keys but enumerates no token vocabulary. No logical key token is invented or locked by this fixture.
notes: agent.start requires name, kind, pane_id and permits only args and timeout_ms as optional request fields.
cwd/env moved to tab.create and pane.split; fixture examples include LOOM_CARD, optional LOOM_HOOK_SOCK, and existing LOOM_ARTIFACTS_DIR.
agent.prompt is the primary text submission method; agent.send is absent.
agent.send_keys is shape-only evidence for explicit logical keys, not primary prompt text.
agent.wait exists but does not change Loom completion authority.
pane_agent_detected final_status/released are additive parser inputs, never completion authority.
